guide.title: User guide.
guide.intro: CenWatch controls nearby screens over Bluetooth. It supports Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Linux, with the best experience today on iPad, Android tablets, and Android large screens.
guide.connectionStep1: Turn on Bluetooth for CenWatch and the target device, then pair from the system Bluetooth screen.
guide.connectionStep2: On first connection the device may ask for a verification code. After pairing, it appears in the connected or saved device list.
guide.connectionStep3: Open the CenWatch app, tap the plus button, and choose the target device. When a cursor appears on the target screen, control is ready.
guide.usageStep1: Practice for 15-30 minutes to make remote touch feel precise and efficient.
guide.usageStep2: Rotate your elbow to move the cursor, keep fingers naturally separated, and click downward like typing.
guide.usageStep3: Move the cursor quickly left/right or up/down to swipe. Rotate quickly once to go back, or twice to return to the home screen on supported devices.
guide.usageStep4: Use a two-finger downward click for long press. Lower your wrist to pause control and lift it to reactivate.
guide.precaution1: CenWatch is not waterproof. Avoid water contact.
guide.precaution2: Wear the watch with the LiDAR side facing your fingers.
guide.precaution3: If Bluetooth devices do not refresh, restart Bluetooth and keep the target device on the connection screen.
guide.precaution4: After startup, touch control can briefly fail for 1-3 minutes before returning to normal.
